title: Purdue researchers develop tool to keep personal images private during AI editing
This Morning’s Ashley James furiously hits back at AI video claiming she’s taking weight loss pills
description: ASHLEY James has become a victim of AI after a video has been circulated online claiming she's taking weight loss pills. The televisionhost, 38, found how realistic the video was to be terrifying and took to Instagram to set the record straight. In a candid video chatting to the camera, Ashley began: "I have a...

title: Healthcare must blend AI with human touch: Apollo’s Preetha Reddy
description: Speaking to CNBC-TV18 at the 21st India Business Leader Awards, Preetha Reddy, Executive Vice Chairperson of Apollo Hospitals, reflected on leadership, family values and the evolution of Indian healthcare. She highlighted the importance of collaboration within the Apollo legacy and praised the younger generation for bringing fresh ideas. Reddy added that while artificial intelligence will transform healthcare, the sector must retain its core human element, noting that India is increasingly emerging as a global destination for high-quality healthcare services.

title: The U.S. is winning the AI chatbot war — and losing the one that actually matters
description: The current AI hype cycle is built on a foundation that doesn't translate to the real world.
